AC1.summary: First-party Telegram CTAs use web_app buttons for Mini App openings; t.me deep links remain plain URL links.

AC2.summary: Idempotent Telegram bot setup script and npm command configure profile, descriptions, commands, menu button, and avatar.

AC3.summary: Mini App navigation stays in /mini, and dashboard-only report links route through /mini/open.

AC4.summary: Mini App shell, navigation, cards, scanner, staff/equipment pages, runtime theme setup, and icon assets were refreshed in WeSetup style.

AC5.summary: Focused tests, targeted lint, TypeScript check, production build, HTTP probe, and screenshot capture succeeded.

notes: Telegram Bot API does not allow a bot to set user chat wallpapers/backgrounds.

Live Telegram bot profile was not mutated during verification because the current local environment has no TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN; run npm run setup:telegram-bot with production env to apply the profile/menu/avatar.
